title: Stolen staff session used to access internal console
impact: Unauthorized access to school, student, payment, result or material controls.
mitigations: short_session_expiry; secure_cookies; session_revocation; failed_login_monitoring; step_up_auth_later; audit_staff_login_events

title: Staff changes own role or scope
impact: Privilege escalation to admin or high-risk approval capability.

title: School user accesses another school's roster using browser-submitted school_id
School changes locked roster or candidate mapping
Browser-submitted amount/payment status accepted
impact: Unpaid schools may pass finance gate or incorrect invoice amount recorded.

title: Manual payment confirmation cannot be traced
impact: Finance disputes and exam gate bypass cannot be investigated.

title: Question paper URL exposed as public or long-lived link
mitigations: private_storage_only; short_lived_signed_urls; download_audit; release_timer; revocation; no_raw_file_urls

title: Material version replaced without approval
impact: Wrong paper or answer sheet released.

title: Answer key or OMR scores altered after approval
impact: Wrong results, trust loss and certificate invalidity.

title: Public verification reveals excessive student data
Sensitive export leaks student PII or answer keys
mitigations: export_reason_required; masking_default; sensitive_export_approval; csv_injection_protection; signed_url_download; export_expiry

title: Public verification endpoint abused by enumeration or bot traffic
impact: Service degradation and certificate existence probing.

title: Bulk notification sent to wrong recipient list
impact: PII leak and school trust loss.

title: Support agent sees raw OMR, answer key or payment payload through linked ticket context
